executor_handoff.system_instructions: Preserve existing patterns. Follow scope exactly — no widening. Use chosen path only. Swift 6 strict concurrency. macOS14+. Edits via serena symbolic tools. Build Valistream scheme + run Valistream.xctestplan after.

task_brief.objective: Make `--preselect` match against playlist alias (roster ID, e.g. "1080p_avc1") by substring, added to existing broad match set. So `./valistream --preselect 1080p` preselects all playlists whose alias/id/name/url contains "1080p".
task_brief.why:
Today matcher searches [id, groupID, name, url]. Video variant id = synthetic "variant-0"; resolution/codecs dropped before selection. User reads alias "1080p_avc1" as the ID but matcher never sees it. So `--preselect 1080p` only matches by luck (url contains it). Add alias to searchable fields. Alias already seeded in registry BEFORE selection runs.
- Matcher: PlaylistSelection.Candidate.matches(_:) — localizedStandardContains over [id, groupID, name, url.absoluteString]. Already substring + case/diacritic-insensitive. - Candidate built only in PlaylistSelection.candidates(references:directMediaURL:) (2 sites). - candidates(...) called once: ValidationSession.swift:295. - resolve(...) called once in prod (ValidationSession:300) + tests. - Alias source: AliasRegistry.alias(for:) -> PlaylistAlias?, .alias is the string. Registry seeded with RESOLUTION/CODECS at ValidationSession:207-210 (master branch) and :251 (direct-media branch), keyed by reference.url / inputURL. Both run BEFORE :295. - ValidationSession is `public actor`. candidates(...) called sync inside actor-isolated run(); aliasFor closure non-escaping → stays actor-isolated, NO Sendable needed.
IN: add `alias` field to Candidate; include alias in matches() field set; inject alias resolver into candidates(); wire registry lookup at ValidationSession:295. Backward-compatible — existing id/groupID/name/url matching preserved. OUT: interactive checklist display (PlaylistChecklist.swift:41, PromptberrySelection.swift:47 still render candidate.id). Do NOT touch. No CLI flag/usage/help changes. No new types.
3 edits, no new type:
1. PlaylistSelection.swift — Candidate struct: Add `public let alias: String?`. Add `alias: String? = nil` to init (last param, defaulted → test call sites unaffected). matches(_:): change fields to let fields = [id, groupID, name, alias, url.absoluteString].compactMap { $0 }
2. PlaylistSelection.swift — candidates(references:directMediaURL:): Add param `aliasFor: (URL) -> String? = { _ in nil }`. direct-media branch: Candidate(id:"media", role:.variant, url:directMediaURL, alias: aliasFor(directMediaURL)) references branch: pass alias: aliasFor(reference.url) into the Candidate(...) build.
3. ValidationSession.swift:295: let candidates = PlaylistSelection.candidates( references: references, directMediaURL: directMediaURL, aliasFor: { aliasRegistry.alias(for: $0)?.alias } )
- Keep `alias` last in init + defaulted nil → existing Candidate(...) constructions (and tests building Candidate directly) compile unchanged. - Candidate is Equatable — adding stored field changes ==. Existing tests compare resolve(candidates) == candidates (same array both sides) → equality still holds. - Resulting semantics (intended): `--preselect 1080p` matches "1080p_avc1" AND "iframe_1080p"; `--preselect 1080` matches too (substring of "1080p"); dedup "1080p_avc1_2" still matches. - Do NOT add Sendable annotations to aliasFor — non-escaping sync use only.
- Valistream/ValistreamCore/Sources/ValistreamCore/Session/PlaylistSelection.swift - Valistream/ValistreamCore/Sources/ValistreamCore/Session/ValidationSession.swift (line ~295) - Tests: Valistream/ValistreamCore/Tests/ValistreamCoreTests/Session/PlaylistSelectionTests.swift - Integration: Valistream/Valistream/ValistreamIntegrationTests/SelectionMatrixTests.swift
grep "func matches(" and "static func candidates(" and "static func resolve(" under ValistreamCore/Sources. grep "PlaylistSelection.candidates" for the single wire site.
- Candidate has `alias: String?`; matches() includes it. - candidates(...) populates alias from injected resolver at both construction branches. - ValidationSession:295 passes aliasRegistry-backed resolver. - NEW unit test: Candidate(alias:"1080p_avc1") + resolve(_, patterns:["1080p"]) → selected; also `["1080"]` → selected. No-alias existing cases unchanged. - NEW integration test (SelectionMatrixTests): master with opaque variant URIs (no resolution in url) + RESOLUTION attrs → `--preselect 1080p` (selectionPatterns:["1080p"], no selectPlaylists) selects the 1080p variant; non-1080p variant/audio not monitored. - No changes to checklist display, CLI flags, usage text.
Build Valistream scheme (xcode-tools BuildProject). Run Valistream.xctestplan — all pass. Confirm existing PlaylistSelectionTests + SelectionPromptPolicyTests still green.
